report.summary: Audited movement-network-guide and based-rollups-preconfirmations-guide for UX/accessibility issues; created static OG images (1200x630 SVG+PNG) for both guides; added breadcrumb nav, BackToTop, aria-labels, Next.js Link components, and mobile table scroll fixes.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added accessible breadcrumb navigation (nav aria-label='Breadcrumb' with aria-hidden separators) to movement-network-guide page
Added accessible breadcrumb navigation (nav aria-label='Breadcrumb' with aria-hidden separators) to based-rollups-preconfirmations-guide page
Added aria-label='Table of contents' to ToC nav element on movement-network-guide for screen reader accessibility
Added aria-label='Table of contents' to ToC nav element on based-rollups-preconfirmations-guide for screen reader accessibility
Replaced all raw <a> internal links with Next.js <Link> components on movement-network-guide (7 links) for client-side navigation and prefetching
Added BackToTop component to movement-network-guide for long-page scroll UX
Added BackToTop component to based-rollups-preconfirmations-guide for long-page scroll UX
Applied responsive clamp() to movement-network-guide h1 fontSize (was fixed value, now clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 2.5rem)) for better mobile readability
Added min-width: 560px to movement-network-guide comparison table (Movement vs Solana vs Aptos vs Sui) for proper horizontal scroll on mobile

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: movement-network-guide (1200x630) — SVG + PNG with indigo/cyan gradient, parallel execution thread visualization (4 threads with tx blocks), 4 stat cards (160K+ TPS, $200M+ TVL, 160+ Projects, <$0.001 Fee), feature pills (MoveVM, EVM Compatible, Celestia DA, 10B $MOVE)

OG image: based-rollups-guide (1200x630) — SVG + PNG with indigo/cyan gradient, based rollup transaction flow diagram (User > L1 Validators > Ethereum Block > Finalized with preconf branch showing ~100ms), comparison cards (Traditional vs Based sequencing), EIP-7917 reference, feature pills (L1 Sequencing, ~100ms, No Sequencer, Composable)

sections.title: Files Modified
items: src/app/learn/movement-network-guide/page.tsx — Added breadcrumb nav, BackToTop import, aria-label on ToC nav, responsive h1 clamp(), min-width on comparison table, replaced 7 raw <a> tags with Next.js <Link> components
src/app/learn/based-rollups-preconfirmations-guide/page.tsx — Added breadcrumb nav, BackToTop import and component, aria-label on ToC nav

sections.title: Files Created
items: public/og-movement-network-guide.png — OG image PNG for social sharing (72KB)
public/og-based-rollups-guide.png — OG image PNG for social sharing (85KB)
